description: FRONTIER: one validator uses a fully-anchored regex to prevent open redirects; siblings use unanchored regexes on trusted tokens. v0.1 detects only sort-divergence, so it misses this.
inspired_by: Open-redirect and validation-bypass bugs from unanchored regex matching

findings.rationale: isValidRedirect anchors its regex with ^...$ because an unanchored match on a redirect target is an open-redirect hole; isValidSlug and isValidTag validate pre-trimmed internal tokens and can match loosely. Unify them onto an unanchored helper and the redirect check accepts hostile targets. A regex-anchoring detector should flag the divergent anchoring; v0.1 (sort-only) cannot.
